caption: A man wearing a dark green t-shirt, a matching green baseball cap, and large black over-ear headphones speaks into a professional black microphone on a stand. His t-shirt features the white text "ION NEVEDO" above a larger, stylized white word that appears to be "SHIT". He is positioned in a room filled with framed photographs on the wall behind him, and a white mannequin wearing a white long-sleeved shirt and grey pants stands in the background next to racks of clothing. Two logos appear on the screen: a circular black and red logo on the left and a red "DRE REY" logo on the right. Throughout the sequence, the man's expression and mouth movements shift slightly as he talks, while the background, equipment, and on-screen graphics remain static.
